---
name: Design proposal
about: Sketch the approach for non-trivial work BEFORE writing code
title: "[Design]: "
labels: "needs design"
assignees: ""
---

<!-- Use this template when:
     - Your change will take more than ~3 days of work, OR
     - It touches a shared subsystem (importers, agents, renderer, theme), OR
     - It's a feature that isn't already on the current milestone.

     For tiny changes or bug fixes, use the regular feature/bug templates instead. -->

## Problem

<!-- 1-2 sentences. What's broken or missing? Who is affected? -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- A sketch, not a spec. Bullet points are fine. Aim for ~5 minutes of writing. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this proposal explicitly does NOT do, even if related -->

## Domains affected

<!-- Tick the domain(s) this touches. Owners will be pinged for thumbs-up. -->

- [ ] Chat & Messaging
- [ ] Roleplay Mode
- [ ] Game Master Mode
- [ ] Characters & Personas
- [ ] Lorebook & Knowledge
- [ ] Presets
- [ ] Agent System
- [ ] LLM Connections
- [ ] Image Generation
- [ ] ST Import & Bot Browser
- [ ] App Shell & Navigation
- [ ] Theme & Palette
- [ ] Database & Migrations
- [ ] Shared Types & Schemas
- [ ] Build, Release & CI
- [ ] Platform Packaging
- [ ] Other / Unsure (explain below)

## Roadmap fit

<!-- Which milestone or vision element does this advance? If you're not sure, say so — that's a valid answer and a sign this needs discussion before code. -->

## Template check
